subcodes.title: Words to some young Bahá'í women, spoken on 1912-10-17
subcodes.first_line: Be seated! How are you? We have been for a walk. San Francisco is a good city. San Francisco is a good garden, fresh and verdant.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @work as worship, @wisdom [hikmat], @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
